name: Lisa's Peanut-Butter-Banana Quick Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Coat 4 small loaf pans with vegetable cooking spray.
3. Combine dry ingredients in a bowl and blend well; set aside.
4. In another bowl, combine wet ingredients and blend well.
5. Mix the wet and dry ingredients together until combined. Do not overmix.
6. Pour batter evenly into the prepared pans.
7. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Notes:
Surprisingly good! These small loaves freeze well once completely cooled, wrapped tightly in plastic wrap. To defrost, place them at room temperature, loosely wrapped, for about an hour. The breads make great gifts for neighbors during Autumn and Christmas.
